item.title: 台湾支持台积电在美国扩张，同时重申在国内先进芯片的领导地位
item.summary: TSMC said on July 16 that it will add US$100 billion to its US investment, bringing the total to US$265 billion. Taiwan's Executive Yuan said it respects companies expanding in the US to meet global market demand, while also backing the chipmaker's continued fab expansion in Taiwan.
